.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper version constant from 0.5.5 to 3.1.1 to use a newer, more secure wrapper implementation.
Update the default download URL to point to the new Maven Wrapper artifact group ID (org.apache.maven.wrapper) compatible with version 3.1.1.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: private static final String DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL = "https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2/org/apache/maven/wrapper/maven-wrapper/" + WRAPPER_VERSION + "/maven-wrapper-" + WRAPPER_VERSION + ".jar";

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Apply modern Java coding conventions including brace placement, spacing, and license header formatting.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: public class MavenWrapperDownloader { -> public class MavenWrapperDownloader \n {

src/test/java/org/acme/GreetingResourceT.general_idea: Add JUnit 5 annotation to disable the test on Windows operating systems.
Change the HTTP endpoint path from '/hello/world' to '/hello' in the test assertion.
Update the expected response body from 'Hola world' to 'Hello World' to match the new endpoint behavior.

pom.xml.general_idea: Rename the project artifact ID to a shorter, cleaner name.
Update the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21.
Upgrade the Quarkus platform BOM to version 3.19.4 to support Java 21 and modern APIs.
Upgrade the Maven compiler plugin to version 3.14.0 for better Java 21 support.
Upgrade the Maven Surefire plugin to version 3.5.2.
Add the formatter-maven-plugin to enforce code formatting standards.
Remove the obsolete failsafe.useModulePath property as it is no longer needed in newer Quarkus/Maven versions.
Replace the deprecated quarkus-resteasy dependency with the new quarkus-rest extension.
Add explicit dependency for Jackson JSON processing in the new REST stack.
Add SmallRye OpenAPI dependency for API documentation generation.
Add Hibernate ORM with REST Data Panache for simplified data access.
Add JDBC driver for PostgreSQL database connectivity.
Add Quarkus OpenShift extension for Kubernetes/OpenShift deployment support.
Add SmallRye Health extension for application health monitoring.
Move the maven-failsafe-plugin configuration from the native profile to the main build section for consistent integration testing.
Simplify the native profile by removing redundant plugin definitions and using skipITs property.

.gitignore.general_idea: Reorganize .gitignore to group Maven-related ignores at the top and remove redundant or incorrect entries.
.gitignore.human_impl: Moved #Maven block to top, removed '*/target' and '*.iml' from Maven section.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .factorypath to .gitignore to exclude VS Code factory path configuration.
.gitignore.human_impl: Added '.factorypath' under # Visual Studio Code section.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .env to .gitignore to prevent committing local environment variables.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper distribution and JAR URLs to newer versions (Maven 3.8.6 and Wrapper 3.1.1) to ensure compatibility with modern build environments.
Add the Apache License 2.0 header to the Maven Wrapper properties file for compliance.
.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.human_impl:
# Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one
# or more contributor license agreements...

README.md.general_idea: Update the Quarkus Maven plugin version in the project generation command to match the newer Quarkus release.
Change the project generation instruction to use the RestEASY reactive extension instead of the legacy one.
Correct indentation in the Java code snippet for the hello method.
Update the return statement in the hello method to append ' world' to the greeting.
Add the missing import for GreetingService in the HelloResource code snippet.
Add a new section documenting how to generate JAX-RS resources using Panache, including dependencies and entity setup.
Document the setup for PostgreSQL database provisioning and data population scripts.
README.md.human_impl: INSERT INTO book(id, name, publicationYear) VALUES (1, 'Sapiens' , 2011);

README.md.general_idea: Add documentation for production database configuration properties.
Update the native executable build command to include the Quarkus CLI alternative.
Add a new section documenting how to deploy the application to an OpenShift cluster.
Add a new section referencing documentation for deploying to a Kubernetes cluster.

mvnw.general_idea: Update the Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Correct the script header comment to remove the outdated '2' from 'Maven2'.
mvnw.human_impl: Maven2 Start Up Batch script -> Maven Start Up Batch script

mvnw.general_idea: Add support for loading system-wide Maven configuration from /usr/local/etc/mavenrc.
Improve Java executable detection to avoid conflicts with shell functions named 'command'.
Upgrade the Maven Wrapper JAR from the deprecated Takari version to the official Apache Maven Wrapper version.
Ensure partial or failed downloads of the wrapper JAR are removed to prevent corruption.
Remove trailing whitespace in the script for cleaner code style.
mvnw.human_impl: Removed trailing spaces after curl command block

mvnw.general_idea: Pass MAVEN_DEBUG_OPTS to the JVM to support debugging configurations.
Reformat the exec command arguments for better readability and maintainability.
mvnw.human_impl: Split long exec line into multiple lines with backslashes

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper JAR version from 0.5.5 to 3.1.1 to align with modern Maven standards.
Change the Maven Wrapper group ID from io.takari to org.apache.maven.wrapper to reflect the official Apache release.
Add usebackq to FOR loop to correctly parse properties file with backticks or special characters.
Replace deprecated %HOME% variable with %USERPROFILE% for better compatibility on Windows systems.
Pass command line arguments to pre-execution RC scripts to allow them to modify environment based on input.
Use cmd /C exit to ensure the error code is correctly propagated to the parent shell process.
Remove spaces around == in IF statements to prevent parsing issues with empty variables.
Break the long Java execution command into multiple lines for better readability.
Update the Apache License URL from http to https for security and modern standards.
Rename 'Maven2' to 'Maven' in the header comment to reflect current naming conventions.
Correct the typo 'key stroke' to 'keystroke' in the documentation comment.
mvnw.cmd.human_impl: @REM MAVEN_BATCH_PAUSE - set to 'on' to wait for a keystroke before ending

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.general_idea: Switch the Docker base image from UBI8/OpenJDK 11 to UBI9/OpenJDK 21 to align with the target Java version.
Remove the LANG environment variable as it is no longer required or supported in the new base image configuration.
Migrate JVM options from JAVA_OPTS to JAVA_OPTS_APPEND to prevent overriding default tuning provided by the new container entrypoint script.
Remove the AB_JOLOKIA_OFF environment variable which is no longer needed or relevant in the new image context.
Explicitly define the entrypoint to use the standard JBoss container run script, ensuring proper initialization for the new base image.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.general_idea: Switch the Docker base image from UBI8 OpenJDK 11 to UBI9 OpenJDK 21 to align with the target Java version.
Adopt the standard JBoss container entrypoint script to handle Java runtime configuration and startup.
Move Quarkus-specific JVM options from JAVA_OPTS to JAVA_OPTS_APPEND to prevent overriding default tuning provided by the new entrypoint script.
Remove the AB_JOLOKIA_OFF environment variable as it is no longer required or supported in the new container image context.
Remove the redundant LANG environment variable, relying on the base image defaults or LANGUAGE setting.
Update the Maven build command in comments to use the newer Quarkus property for legacy jar packaging.
Clarify documentation regarding debug port exposure and required environment variables for the new container runtime.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.human_impl: # Additionally you will have to set -e JAVA_DEBUG=true and -e JAVA_DEBUG_PORT=*:5005

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native.general_idea: Update the comment to reflect the new Maven flag for native builds.
Add comments explaining the base image version and how to switch to UBI 8.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native.human_impl:
+# The ` registry.access.redhat.com/ubi9/ubi-minimal:9.5` base image is based on UBI 9.
+# To use UBI 8, switch to `quay.io/ubi8/ubi-minimal:8.10`.

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native.general_idea: Upgrade the base Docker image from UBI 8 to UBI 9 to align with newer JDK/runtime requirements.
Explicitly set executable permissions on the application binary during the COPY step.
Replace CMD with ENTRYPOINT to ensure the application binary is always executed as the main process.
